target: 7. Light and Shadow

Yes, here we go!
This is the last one!

So it's the Koba Mart again…
I know this place well too.

If it's closed, does that mean it's a holiday?
There's not much to do on a day off anyway.

Exactly!
This is my friend's house.
That's convenient - this is also my friend's house.

Wait?
Is Hizuru-chan also friends with Shiori-chan?

No, it's not like that.
My friends are…
…Hizuru?

Ah, Asako.
It's been a while.

Ah, you're back!?
Why didn't you call!?

Sorry.
I didn't have the chance--
No, right now, I really don't have the chance.
Hello~!

Hello, Hoine-chan!
You came with Hizuru?

Yeah!
I'm showing her around the island.
Eh, around the island?

There's no deep meaning…
I was forced to take care of Ryunosuke's niece.
Heh, that's how it is.
Shiori-chan, is she here~?

Yeah, she's here. She'll play with you!
Hizuru, come visit me too!
Ah, okay, just a little.

Sorry there's nothing else.
Here, tea.
Ah, thanks.
So, what's up?
Huh? Sudden question.
You seem down.
…It's just from being tired from dealing with kids.

Even if it's a kid, it's Hoine-chan, right?
I don't think she'd be that troublesome.

(With another kid, would that be too much?
I can't believe it…)
Hey, Hizuru…

You're not just tired, are you?
Just be honest.

You can't treat friends like that?
Even if we haven't seen each other for a while, I know that.

But I won't push you.
If you want to talk, I'm always here.
I said it's just tired!

Haha… Yeah, yeah!
You're still stubborn as ever!

Haha!
Wait, wait~!

Hehe~!
You'll never catch me~!

Hey! Don't run around!
You'll fall!
Yeah~!
Ugh, at least respond!
That kid's Asako's daughter.

Yeah, Shiori.
Sorry, my kid's a bit rowdy.

No problem.
Asako was pretty wild too, once.

W-what, back when we were students!?
Was I really that loud!?
No, you're still the same.
Haha! You got me!

But when you have kids,
any parent's like that, right?
Is that how it is?

Exactly, that's how it is.
Don't you want kids, Hizuru?

I don't even have a partner.
Human asexual reproduction is impossible.
Asexual reproduction?

Right now, I don't even have the interest or imagination
to create a family.

But as a literary theme, it's a universal topic.
I'm interested in that aspect, though.
( Family… home… parents… children… parent-child… )

( Family, parents and children… Maybe it's a clue,
but with just my knowledge, it's insufficient )
Asako, what is a child?

Here it comes!
A sudden question!

Back when Hizuru was on the island,
you'd get sudden questions like this and be confused.
So that's how it was?

Intellectual curiosity?
That's just your strong point.

Seriously, you're still the same as before.
It's reassuring.

Stop giving me that vague compliment,
answer my question from before.

Hmm… Well…
A child to me is…
…Light, I guess.
Light…?

Yes, light.
The light that illuminates everything.
Just having Shiori around makes every day bright.

The atmosphere in the house, everyone's feelings and expressions,
everything becomes brighter because of her.
Hm…
Then if children are light, what are you parents?

If children are light, parents are shadows…
I guess.
After all, shadows come with light.

Supporting from beside, watching from afar,
parents support children in various ways.

But if a child loses their light,
parents become the light to illuminate them.

In that way, they influence each other…
That's how parents and children grow, right?

I see… Light and shadow are two sides of the same coin,
and their forms aren't fixed.
Was that helpful at all?
Hizuru?
( Light and shadow… children and parents… )
( A child who was light will one day become a shadow as a parent… )
No way, you're lost in your own world.
( Changing how you shine can create shadows of various sizes and shapes… )

( Light… shadow…
What am I, exactly, right now? )

Hey, Hizuru!
Hizuru!
Hizuru-chan, it's time to go!

Are you okay?
You seem worse than before?
Don't worry…
Thank you for visiting!
Bye~!
Come again anytime, you two!
Yeah~!
Hah…
Hizuru-chan's friend was Shiori-chan's mom.
That's right…

( Children and parents… Light and shadow…
I got some useful words, but…)
( I still seem far from getting out of this slump… )
